name: window-saver
description: Menu-bar workspace launcher: save a set of apps/windows/urls/terminals as a Profile, replay it with one click or hotkey.

scripts.build:preload: tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && mkdir -p dist/preload && mv dist/preload-build/preload/index.js dist/preload/index.cjs && rm -rf dist/preload-build
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
